lines.lyrics: Spinning out on what to say or what to do, Finding reasons for my constant change in mood

lines.chords: Em A | D Gmaj7 | Em A
lines.lyrics: Said I'll see it to believe it, but who knows the actual truth? 'Cause I'm sure now, I'm sure
'Cause days blend to one when I'm on the right beaches
And the walls painted white, they tell me all the secrets

lines.chords: Em A | D Gmaj7 | Em A
lines.lyrics: Don't wait for the tide just to dip both your feet in, 'Cause I'm sure now, I'm sure

Em A | D Gmaj7 D/F# | Em A | D Gmaj7
lines.lyrics: Find it hard to say, I know that I'm alright, Took a while for me to finally realise

lines.chords: Em A | D Gmaj7 | Em A
lines.lyrics: That when I see it, I'll believe it, giving me a peace of mind, I'm sure now, I'm sure
'Cause days blend to one when I'm on the right beaches
And the walls painted white, they tell me all the secrets

lines.chords: Em A | D Gmaj7 | Em A
lines.lyrics: Don't wait for the tide just to dip both your feet in, 'Cause I'm sure now, I'm sure

lines.chords: D A/C# Gmaj7 | D A/C# Gmaj7
lines.lyrics: I'm afraid to fall down, But I understand the coming outcome,
Pick it up if I allow it, can't help it, can't help
'Cause days blend to one when I'm on the right beaches
And the walls painted white, they tell me all the secrets
Don't wait for the tide just to dip both your feet in
